old_value: {"id":"adafruit_16_servo-z1r","title":"Add time multiplier for long-duration sequences (30min-1hr)","description":"Sequences need to support long durations (30 minutes to 1 hour) for final use, but must remain testable at short durations during development. Approach: add a time multiplier system so sequences are authored with short test timings and scaled up for production. Consider a global multiplier settable via serial command (e.g. TIMESCALE 10x) or per-sequence multiplier in sequence_setup.h.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"tatecarson@pm.me","created_at":"2026-02-16T00:20:29Z","created_by":"Tate Carsson","updated_at":"2026-02-16T00:20:29Z","work_type":"mutex"}

new_value: Implemented TIMESCALE command and time multiplier scaling for PLAY/SPLAY sequences. Duration fields widened to uint32_t. Unit tests added in test/. Hardware-dependent blockers remain open for later validation.

old_value: {"id":"adafruit_16_servo-v38","title":"Investigate VS Code Beads extension incompatibility with bd 0.59","description":"VS Code extension planet57.vscode-beads v0.12.0 attempts to run 'bd daemon --start' and connect to .beads/bd.sock, but project uses bd 0.59.0 where the daemon command is gone and CLI operates via direct/Dolt mode. Confirm whether extension needs update, downgrade, or replacement, and document a supported workflow for this repo.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"tatecarson@pm.me","created_at":"2026-03-11T20:33:31Z","created_by":"Tate Carsson","updated_at":"2026-03-11T20:33:31Z"}

{"id":"adafruit_16_servo-02d","title":"Add manual combined winch and rotation test command","description":"Need a direct serial command for hardware testing that moves all winch servos together while also setting the rotation servo speed in one command. This is for manual integration testing and should stay separate from PLAY/SPLAY automation.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"tatecarson@pm.me","created_at":"2026-03-11T20:38:49Z","created_by":"Tate Carsson","updated_at":"2026-03-11T20:38:49Z"}

new_value: Implemented RIG manual test command for coordinated winch positioning and rotation speed control. Updated help/docs, added manual hardware test steps, ran unit tests and verified sketch compiles for arduino:avr:uno.

old_value: {"id":"adafruit_16_servo-sz7","title":"Add per-servo winch travel limits","description":"DOWN 0 100 overshoots because 100% maps to full 5-turn range (1800 deg) instead of actual winch travel. Add upDegrees/downDegrees to ServoConfig so percent commands map to usable range.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"tatecarson@pm.me","created_at":"2026-03-17T15:29:40Z","created_by":"Tate Carsson","updated_at":"2026-03-17T15:29:40Z"}

new_value: Added upDegrees, downDegrees, and reverseDir to ServoConfig. Tested on hardware — all 3 winch servos confirmed working with correct direction.

old_value: {"id":"adafruit_16_servo-ig3","title":"Integrate continuous servo into keyframe sequences","description":"Currently the continuous servo (channel 3, goBILDA 25-3) has its own separate speed sequence (SPLAY). Add a unified sequence mode that combines positional keyframes and speed frames so you can run everything from a single PLAY command. This may require a new sequence type that interleaves Keyframe and SpeedFrame arrays, or a master sequence that triggers sub-sequences.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"tatecarson@pm.me","created_at":"2026-02-15T23:09:09Z","created_by":"Tate Carsson","updated_at":"2026-02-15T23:09:09Z","work_type":"mutex"}

new_value: Implemented a master program layer that can chain PLAY and SPLAY sequences
Implemented chained RUN program playback with LOOP support and docs updates

old_value: {"id":"adafruit_16_servo-rxj","title":"Add chained sequence programs for long-running playback","description":"Add a master program layer above PLAY/SPLAY so existing sequences can be chained into longer continuous shows. Programs should reference existing sequence IDs, support LOOP, and advance automatically when each sub-sequence completes. Update serial commands and docs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"tatecarson@pm.me","created_at":"2026-03-17T19:59:19Z","created_by":"Tate Carsson","updated_at":"2026-03-17T20:03:17Z","closed_at":"2026-03-17T20:03:17Z","close_reason":"Implemented chained RUN program playback with LOOP support and docs updates"}

{"id":"adafruit_16_servo-3hb","title":"Add winch sequence with two raised and one touching base","description":"User requested a new PLAY sequence where two winches lift while the remaining winch stays low enough to touch the base. Add the keyframe sequence to sequence_setup.h, expose it via PLAY, and update README sequence docs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"tatecarson@pm.me","created_at":"2026-03-18T18:50:11Z","created_by":"Tate Carsson","updated_at":"2026-03-18T18:50:11Z"}
